metadata.description: Integration Service API Workflow for source_system 'insurer-aurora-specialty'. Emits an 'insurer-directive' event payload (schema: specs/003-uipath-native/event-contracts/insurer-directive.json-schema.json) consumed by the Maestro Trigger that creates the Action Center HITL task (tvlKcFYnW) in the Fiduciary Review stage at t+200s. DEPLOY-TIME NOTE: the live Data Fabric read (Insurer.policy_directives entity) and the Maestro Trigger emission are wired at deploy via 'uip api-workflow registry stub' against a live tenant. Here the payload is shaped from workflow inputs (Data Fabric defaults) by a JavaScript/Assign activity; the connector read is NOT hand-authored.

default: no public statement without counsel review
engage Hawthorne Mercer LLP for privilege review

script.code: return { event_type: 'insurer-directive', source_system: 'insurer-aurora-specialty', simulated_day: $workflow.input.simulated_day, insurer_id: 'aurora-specialty', directive_type: 'reservation_of_rights', conditions: $workflow.input.conditions, coverage_sub_limit_triggered: $workflow.input.coverage_sub_limit_triggered, required_actions: $workflow.input.required_actions };

Response_1.response: ${{ event_type: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.event_type, source_system: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.source_system, simulated_day: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.simulated_day, insurer_id: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.insurer_id, directive_type: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.directive_type, conditions: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.conditions, coverage_sub_limit_triggered: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.coverage_sub_limit_triggered, required_actions: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.required_actions }}
